name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_PackagedMedicinalProduct
title: R5: Package type for the product additional types
description: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding, text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MedicinalProduct.packagedMedicinalProduct` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicinalProductPackaged)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.packagedMedicinalProduct` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.packagedMedicinalProduct` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding, text.
